visible_response:
Suppose I call everything I like 'I' and everything I dislike
'Ouspensky', it would be a wrong separation.
The 'I' from which I
observe is a point, it has no material existence yet, it is only the embryo
from which 'I' can grow It I give it material existence, it would be wrong.
